translation.common_access_denied: Access restricted to the Administration Team.
translation.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
translation.auth_activate_account_modal_message: We sent an activation link to your email, but it seems it hasn't been used yet. Should we send it again to {{email}}?
translation.auth_password_recovery_subtitle: No problem! Enter your e-mail and we'll send you a link to create a new password.
translation.auth_error_loading_churches: We couldn't load the churches. Please try again later.
translation.auth_legal_agreement: I have read and agree to the
translation.auth_terms_of_use: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
translation.auth_toast_resent_confirmation_success_m: Check your inbox and spam folder.
translation.auth_toast_password_recovery_success_mes: If your e-mail is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password.
translation.auth_toast_signup_success_message: We've sent an activation link to your e-mail.
translation.auth_toast_account_deleted: Your account has been successfully deleted.
translation.auth_error_accept_terms: You must accept the terms to create an account.
translation.auth_error_delete_account: Could not delete your account. Please try again.
translation.auth_error_change_password: Could not change password. The link may have expired.
translation.validation_password_min_length: Your password must be at least {{count}} characters long.
translation.validation_fullname_min_length: Your name must be at least {{count}} characters long.
translation.auth_error_user_already_registered: This e-mail is already registered. Try logging in.
translation.auth_error_invalid_login_credentials: Incorrect e-mail or password. Check and try again.
translation.auth_error_email_not_confirmed: Your account needs to be activated. Check the link in your e-mail.
translation.auth_error_password_too_short: Your password is too short. Try a longer one.
translation.auth_error_rate_limit: Too many attempts. For your security, please try again later.
translation.auth_error_user_already_confirmed: This e-mail has already been confirmed. You can log in.
translation.auth_error_invalid_email: The provided e-mail address is invalid.
translation.auth_error_admin_url_not_set: Admin URL not set. E-mail links may not work.
translation.session_error_expired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
translation.landing_hero_subtitle: Christ's Shoulder connects your mission to mentorship, with tools for a deeper and guided spiritual journey.
translation.landing_feature1_desc: Reflections that nourish the soul and direct your purpose.
translation.landing_feature2_desc: A safe space to record your prayers and thoughts.
translation.landing_feature3_desc: Receive support, prayer, and guidance with complete privacy.
translation.auth_confirmed_message_success: Your account has been successfully confirmed. You can now close this page and access the application.
translation.auth_confirmed_message_error: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used. Please try to log in to the application. If the account is not yet confirmed, you can request a new confirmation link on the app's login screen.
translation.password_recovery_message_success: Your password has been successfully changed. You can now close this page.
translation.password_recovery_message_error: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new recovery link in the mobile app.
translation.password_recovery_message_info: To recover your password, the process must be initiated through the Christ's Shoulder mobile app. Please access the app to request the recovery link.
translation.terms_page_title: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
translation.user_menu_delete_confirm_message: This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted. Are you sure?
translation.churches_form_error_create: Could not create the new church.
translation.churches_delete_message: The church {{name}} will be permanently deleted. Associated profiles will lose their link. This action cannot be undone.
translation.devotionals_form_title_placeholder: E.g., Be Strong in the Lord
translation.devotionals_delete_message: This devotional will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
translation.users_edit_alert:
Permission and gender changes will be applied on the user's next login to the app.
Name and Mentorship are managed by the user in the app.
